targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Clusters" FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest WHERE 1=1
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_host_count), 0) AS "Hosts" FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest WHERE 1=1
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_vm_count), 0) AS "VMs" FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest WHERE 1=1
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))

SELECT collection_timestamp AS time, COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS metric,
  cpu_usage_avg_percent AS "CPU %"
FROM vmware_cluster_metrics
WHERE collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY time

SELECT collection_timestamp AS time, COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS metric,
  memory_usage_avg_percent AS "Memory %"
FROM vmware_cluster_metrics
WHERE collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Disk I/O over time for root cause analysis.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT collection_timestamp AS time, COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS metric,
  disk_usage_avg_kbps AS "Disk (KBps)"
FROM vmware_cluster_metrics
WHERE collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Disk I/O (KBps) - time series

panels.description: Network usage over time for root cause analysis.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT collection_timestamp AS time, COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS metric,
  network_usage_avg_kbps AS "Network (KBps)"
FROM vmware_cluster_metrics
WHERE collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Network (KBps) - time series

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS cluster_name, COALESCE(cpu_usage_avg_percent, 0) AS "CPU %"
FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY "CPU %" DESC

SELECT COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS cluster_name, COALESCE(memory_usage_avg_percent, 0) AS "Memory %"
FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY "Memory %" DESC

SELECT vcenter_name AS "vCenter", datacenter_name AS "Datacenter",
  COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS "Cluster",
  total_host_count AS "Hosts", total_vm_count AS "VMs",
  total_cpu_ghz AS "CPU (GHz)", total_memory_gb AS "Memory (GB)",
  cpu_usage_avg_percent AS "CPU %", memory_usage_avg_percent AS "Mem %"
FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY vcenter_name, datacenter_name, "Cluster"

list.label: vCenter
list.name: vcenter
list.query: SELECT name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter ORDER BY name

list.label: Datacenter
list.name: datacenter
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT dc.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON dc.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
WHERE '$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Location
list.name: location
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) AS loc FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Cluster
list.name: cluster
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT cl.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$location' = '' OR SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) IN ($location))
ORDER BY 1
